title: Evaluation Result
description: The result of evaluating a candidate solution against an objective.

id.description: Unique identifier for this evaluation result.

evaluator_id.description: Identifier of the evaluator that produced this result.

status.description: Evaluation status: PASS, FAIL, BLOCKED, or UNKNOWN.

checked_constraints.description: Constraint identifiers that were checked during this evaluation.

threshold_results.description: Threshold check result identifiers from this evaluation.

evidence_ref.description: Reference to the evidence artifact for this evaluation result.

failure_reasons.description: Reasons for failure if status is FAIL or BLOCKED.
